function.name: replay_gesture_map
function.description: Replay a recorded gesture map by name for an app. Coordinates are resolution-normalized and scaled to the current screen. Steps with wait_for_screen_change will automatically wait for a screen transition event before continuing. fill_credential steps automatically call fill_credential_field.

name.description: Gesture map name returned by search_gesture_maps, e.g. 'foodpanda_login'
